text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh no... Why can't I get this right?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
A respectable Umadol can't let herself break out
like this! I have cover this up somehow...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon's attempt to cover up her irritated
skin is unsuccessful.
